reasons: Angela can attach to Claude when he enters with Blazing Duet.
Claude's dive pattern benefits from extra protection because he often enters the middle of the fight.

proof.summary: Claude dives into a risky damage window, while Angela gives shield and attached support to reduce the punishment risk.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Claude's real Blazing Duet entry.
Claude enters after enemy burst or control is partially spent.
failureCases: Claude dives before Angela can attach.
Enemy suppression or hard control catches Claude through the shield.
Claude enters without enough item damage.

reasons: Floryn can heal Claude globally even when Claude enters far from the support's position.
Claude benefits from global sustain because Blazing Duet often places him inside enemy damage range.

proof.summary: Claude commits into a high-risk teamfight window, while Floryn's global heal can keep him alive during or after the entry.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Claude's real engage or the enemy counter-burst.
Claude enters when he has Battle Mirror Image available for repositioning.
failureCases: Claude is instantly controlled before healing can matter.
Claude dives alone without team pressure.

reasons: Tigreal can group enemies, making Claude's Blazing Duet hit more valuable targets.
Claude can wait for Tigreal's engage before committing his mobility skill and ultimate.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls a grouped fight area, while Claude enters afterward to apply AoE marksman damage.
worksBestWhen: Claude has Battle Mirror Image or an exit path ready after the ultimate.
failureCases: Claude enters before Tigreal lands control.
Claude is locked down immediately after Blazing Duet starts.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies together for Claude's AoE damage.
Claude can use Battle Mirror Image to enter after Atlas confirms the grouped setup.

proof.summary: Atlas creates a grouped crowd-control moment, while Claude converts it into Blazing Duet damage.
worksBestWhen: Atlas pulls enemies before Claude enters.
Claude keeps an exit path with Battle Mirror Image.
failureCases: Atlas catches only one target or misses the pull.
Enemy burst is saved for Claude after Atlas engages.

reasons: Chip can create a portal entry that lets Claude join a fight quickly after the target area is chosen.
Claude can use the portal entry as a shortcut into Blazing Duet range instead of walking through enemy zoning.

proof.summary: Chip creates a team teleport path toward an enemy area, while Claude uses the arrival window to enter with Blazing Duet.
worksBestWhen: Chip places Shortcut on a target the team can actually collapse on.
Claude keeps Battle Mirror Image ready after arriving.
The team follows the same portal timing.
failureCases: Claude enters through the portal before teammates are ready.
The enemy uses the portal timing to counter-engage.
Chip places Shortcut too deep and Claude has no safe exit.
